_note: Pull-only Harbor lab. skopeo ships in dcs-workshop-base. Check args use the concrete CRC test registry (ghcr.io/rummens) because smoke_test single-quotes args, so $DCS_REGISTRY would not expand — the workshop content itself uses {{< param dcs_registry >}}/$DCS_REGISTRY correctly. On real DCS these hit Harbor with a read-only robot account instead.

steps.run: envsubst < pod-from-catalog.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc wait --for=condition=Ready pod/hello-catalog --timeout=120s
